extracted_information: THCA products are classified as high-risk for merchant processing due to their association with cannabis, which is federally illegal as THC, despite THCA being Hemp Farm Bill compliant (less than 0.3% Delta-9 THC). This creates complex regulatory challenges, compliance issues, and legal uncertainties, deterring traditional payment processors and banks. Businesses face elevated chargeback and fraud risks, along with varying state regulations. Financial institutions avoid cannabis-related businesses due to reputational and legal concerns, leading to limited access to traditional banking services. Specialized high-risk merchant processors, such as Green Financial Service, provide tailored solutions for secure, compliant, and efficient payment processing in this challenging environment.
features: Requires special merchant processing due to high-risk classification
Traditional payment processors often avoid due to association with cannabis
Faces complex regulatory challenges and compliance issues
Stigma and legal uncertainties deter standard financial institutions
Varying legal landscape and regulations between states
Limited access to traditional banking services due to financial institution avoidance of cannabis-related businesses
Specialized high-risk merchant processors offer tailored solutions
Solutions aim for secure, compliant, and efficient payment processing
